title: Add WiFi for Devices That Support It

messages.author: skykingisepic
messages.text: Good Guidance from @recrof instead of adding companion wifi for all the boards, let me create a guide how to do it: duplicate the definition for companion_usb rename it to companiton_wifi add WIFI_SSID and WIFI_PWD to build_flags (same as heltec v3) press [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[P] or [CMD]+[SHIFT]+[P] and type: reload and choose Developer: Reload Window choose newly created LilyGo T-Beam Companion WiFi and build / upload
messages.content_html: Good Guidance from @recrof instead of adding companion wifi for all the boards, let me create a guide how to do it: duplicate the definition for companion_usb rename it to companiton_wifi add WIFI_SSID and WIFI_PWD to build_flags (same as heltec v3) press [CTRL]+[SHIFT]+[P] or [CMD]+[SHIFT]+[P] and type: reload and choose Developer: Reload Window choose newly created LilyGo T-Beam Companion WiFi and build / upload
